{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Bridge (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] punched a hole into the [[Grand Hive]]'s bridge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
